interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage featured content and quick-start options, optionally personalized by ZIP.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Optional ZIP code to personalize nearby locations and deals.

valid_to.description: ISO datetime of expiration, if any

next_available_oil_change_datetime.description: ISO datetime for next available oil change slot, if known

interfaces.name: searchLocations
interfaces.description: Search for service locations by ZIP or city with filters such as rating, late hours, and shuttle service.

parameters.name: zipOrCity
parameters.description: ZIP code or city name to search around, e.g., '30301' or 'Chicago'.

openAtTime.description: Filter locations that are open at or after this local time (HH:MM), e.g., '19:00' for open past 7 PM.

offersFreeShuttle.description: Filter to locations that offer free shuttle service.

minShuttleRadiusMiles.description: Minimum shuttle radius in miles, e.g., 5 for 'up to 5 miles'.

interfaces.name: getLocationDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific location, including hours, services, shuttle info, and location-specific offers.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: ID of the Location whose details should be shown.

interfaces.name: getServiceCategories
interfaces.description: Get all active service categories for navigation and category browsing.

interfaces.name: getServicesByCategory
interfaces.description: List services within a given category with brief descriptions and starting prices.

parameters.name: categorySlug
parameters.description: Slug of the service category, e.g., 'tires_wheels', 'brakes', 'oil_changes'.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific service, including typical duration, description, and popular packages.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: ID of the Service to display.

interfaces.name: searchServiceAvailability
interfaces.description: Search locations offering a given service (or specific package) on a specific date, including prices and available time slots.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: ID of the Service, e.g., Standard Oil Change, Flat Tire Repair.

parameters.name: servicePackageId
parameters.description: Optional specific ServicePackage ID, if the user has already chosen a particular package.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: ZIP code to search around, e.g., '30301'.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Desired service date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format, e.g., today or next Saturday.

minClosingTime.description: Filter to locations that close at or after this time (HH:MM), e.g., '19:00' for 7 PM.

maxPrice.description: Maximum price for the service/package at that location.

interfaces.name: getLocationServiceCatalog
interfaces.description: Get the catalog of services and packages available at a specific location for scheduling.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location ID whose service catalog should be displayed.

interfaces.name: getAppointmentTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get all available appointment time slots for a specific service package at a location on a given date.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location where the service will be performed.

parameters.name: servicePackageId
parameters.description: ServicePackage ID being scheduled.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for which to list time slots, in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: createAppointment
interfaces.description: Book an appointment for a specific service package, time slot, and location, including visit type and shuttle details.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location ID where the appointment will take place.

parameters.name: servicePackageId
parameters.description: ServicePackage being booked.

parameters.name: timeSlotId
parameters.description: AppointmentTimeSlot ID selected by the user, if booking against a defined slot.

parameters.name: appointmentDatetime
parameters.description: Exact appointment datetime in ISO format if not using a predefined timeSlotId.

parameters.name: visitType
parameters.description: Type of visit: 'drop_off', 'wait', or 'shuttle'.

parameters.name: shuttlePickupAddress
parameters.description: Pickup address if visitType is 'shuttle'.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes about the vehicle or visit.

interfaces.name: listCoupons
interfaces.description: List coupons and deals, optionally filtered by category and minimum discount.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Coupon category filter, e.g., 'brakes', 'oil_changes', 'tires'.

parameters.name: minDiscountPercent
parameters.description: Minimum discount percent (for 'percent_off' coupons).

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Optional location ID to show only coupons available at a specific shop.

interfaces.name: getCouponDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific coupon, including applicable services and terms.

parameters.name: couponId
parameters.description: Coupon ID to display.

interfaces.name: getEligibleServicePackagesForCoupon
interfaces.description: List service packages eligible for a given coupon, optionally filtered to one service, with estimated discounted prices.

parameters.name: couponId
parameters.description: Coupon ID to evaluate.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Optional Service ID to narrow results, e.g., front brake pad replacement.

interfaces.name: addServiceWithCouponToCart
interfaces.description: Add a service package to the cart with a coupon applied. Handles cart creation internally.

parameters.name: servicePackageId
parameters.description: ServicePackage ID to add with the coupon.

parameters.name: couponId
parameters.description: Coupon ID being applied.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Quantity of the service to add.

interfaces.name: getVehicleYears
interfaces.description: Get available vehicle years for maintenance plan and reminder dropdowns.

interfaces.name: getVehicleMakes
interfaces.description: Get makes available for a given model year.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Vehicle year, e.g., 2018.

interfaces.name: getVehicleModels
interfaces.description: Get models available for a given year and make.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Vehicle year, e.g., 2018.

parameters.name: make
parameters.description: Vehicle make, e.g., 'Honda'.

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlansForVehicle
interfaces.description: Get maintenance plans available for a specific vehicle Year/Make/Model combination.

interfaces.name: compareMaintenancePlans
interfaces.description: Get comparison data for multiple maintenance plans to display side by side.

parameters.name: planIds
parameters.description: IDs of MaintenancePlan records to compare.

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific maintenance plan.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: MaintenancePlan ID to display.

interfaces.name: addMaintenancePlanToCart
interfaces.description: Add a maintenance plan to the cart for enrollment. Handles cart creation internally.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: MaintenancePlan ID to add.

interfaces.name: getQuoteServiceOptions
interfaces.description: Get list of services that are available through the quote request flow (quote-only services).

interfaces.name: getQuoteAvailabilityByZip
interfaces.description: Get available date/time options for quote-based services across nearby locations within a time window and date range.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service ID for the quote, e.g., Engine Diagnostics / Check Engine Light.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: ZIP code to search, e.g., '60601'.

parameters.name: daysAhead
parameters.description: Number of days ahead from today to consider.

parameters.name: preferredStartTime
parameters.description: Preferred daily start time (HH:MM), e.g., '08:00'.

parameters.name: preferredEndTime
parameters.description: Preferred daily end time (HH:MM), e.g., '10:00'.

interfaces.name: submitQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request for a service at a chosen location with preferred date/time and contact details.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service being requested, e.g., engine diagnostics.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location chosen for the quote request.

parameters.name: visitType
parameters.description: Visit type for the quote request: 'drop_off', 'wait', or 'shuttle'.

parameters.name: requestedDatetime
parameters.description: Preferred drop-off datetime in ISO format.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardProducts
interfaces.description: List available gift card products/templates such as Email Gift Card.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific gift card product, including preset and custom amount limits.

parameters.name: giftCardProductId
parameters.description: GiftCardProduct ID to display.

interfaces.name: addGiftCardToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a gift card instance and add it to the cart. Handles cart creation internally.

parameters.name: giftCardProductId
parameters.description: GiftCardProduct being purchased.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Gift card amount in USD, e.g., 100.

parameters.name: deliveryMethod
parameters.description: Delivery method, e.g., 'email' or 'physical_mail'.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get full cart contents and pricing summary for cart and checkout pages.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update quantity for a cart item and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: CartItem ID to update.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity for the item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: CartItem ID to remove.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get checkout-ready summary including items, subtotals, discounts, taxes, and total.

interfaces.name: submitCheckout
interfaces.description: Finalize purchase/booking for the current cart with payment details.

parameters.name: paymentMethodToken
parameters.description: Opaque token representing the selected payment method.

interfaces.name: createMaintenanceReminderSchedule
interfaces.description: Create and activate a maintenance reminder schedule for a vehicle with specified frequency and contact preferences.

parameters.name: reminderFrequency
parameters.description: Reminder frequency enum, e.g., 'every_3_months'.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get About Us page content including company history, mission, certifications, and guarantees.

interfaces.name: getContactSupportInfo
interfaces.description: Get global contact and support information including phone numbers, emails, and guidance on modifying appointments.

interfaces.name: submitContactSupportRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact/support inquiry through the website contact form.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Optional topic such as 'general_question', 'appointment_change', 'billing', 'website_issue', 'other'.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get structured privacy policy content for the Privacy page.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfServiceContent
interfaces.description: Get structured terms of service content for the Terms page.

interfaces.name: searchLocationsWithShuttleFilter
interfaces.description: Specialized convenience wrapper to search for locations near a ZIP that offer free shuttle service within a minimum radius.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: ZIP code to search, e.g., '75201'.

parameters.name: minShuttleRadiusMiles
parameters.description: Minimum shuttle radius in miles, e.g., 5.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current user's Cart from local storage or backend.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, discounts, taxes, and total after modifications.

helperFunctions.name: _applyCouponToPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute discounted prices based on Coupon configuration.

helperFunctions.name: _findNearestLocations
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute distances and sort locations by proximity to a ZIP or coordinates.

helperFunctions.name: _getDefaultServicePackageForService
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that returns the default ServicePackage for a given Service, used in availability and quote flows.
